description_long: This is a rustic, wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo box and two large spoked wheels mounted on either side. The cart features two straight wooden handles extending from the front, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a weathered, utilitarian appearance, and the planks are reinforced with vertical wooden supports. The rear panel of the cart displays a faded emblem and some Japanese text, adding a touch of character and suggesting possible historical or cultural use. The interior is open and deep, suitable for carrying various goods or materials. The wheels are robust and slightly worn, indicating the cart is built for practical, everyday use in urban or rural settings.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with a deep rectangular cargo box, two large spoked wheels, and dual straight handles for manual transport. The cart features visible wood grain, reinforced planks, and a faded emblem on the rear panel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, including the deep cargo box, two straight handles, and one large spoked wheel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back panel with a faded emblem and Japanese text, as well as both wheels and the open cargo area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other large spoked wheel, the cargo box, and the handles extending forward.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open cargo area, the two straight handles, and the depth of the box.
